name: memoria
description: Local-first LLM-driven memory skill for recording, consolidating, and querying Memoria work memories.

interface.shortDescription: Record and query local work memories
interface.longDescription: Memoria provides a local-first CLI workflow for saving raw work context, running LLM sleep consolidation, querying Memory Issues and Chains, and understanding the backend tool-call flow.
defaultPrompt: Use $memoria to record this work context into Memoria.
Use $memoria to query recent Memoria issues.
Use $memoria to explain the Memoria sleep tool loop.
